Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Aug-09-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Laura J. Maechtlen of Seyfarth & Shaw, LLP, 397-2823, appearing for defendant and moving party
Aaron P. Minnis of Mattingly & Minnis, LLP, 551-0883, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS ADVENT SOFTWARE, INC. and GEOFFREY CLAUSS' Motion To Compel Arbitration. The Motion to compel arbitration and to stay litigation is granted pursuant to section 6.5 of the parties' agreement. Section 5 and the last sentence of section 6.5 are stricken to eliminate unfair unilateral terms. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
